messages.text: ADR-0005 is merged — we're on Supabase, EU/Frankfurt region. Firebase prototype is officially superseded.
🎉 great. this unblocks the health-insurer conversations on data residency.
reminder: do NOT build new services against Firebase (ADR-0002). all new data goes to Supabase EU.
does this change anything for the science-panel content store?
nope, content stays the same, just the backend region changes. all EU now.
